title: Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak

seo.h1: Authentic Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak Recipe

seo.imageAlt: Authentic Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak cooked rare, sliced, and served on a wooden board.
seo.imageCaption: Experience the true taste of Tuscany with this perfectly grilled Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak.

description: Bistecca alla Fiorentina is a legendary Tuscan steak, renowned for its incredible flavor and impressive size. This iconic dish features a thick-cut T-bone or porterhouse, grilled rare over hot coals to achieve a perfect crust and juicy interior. It is a true celebration of simple, high-quality ingredients and traditional Italian grilling.

ingredients.notes: such as Sale Marino di Trapani

instructions.title: Prepare the Steak
instructions.text: Remove the Bistecca alla Fiorentina from the refrigerator at least 1 hour before cooking to bring it to room temperature. This ensures even cooking. Pat the steak thoroughly dry with paper towels to help create a good crust.

instructions.title: Season Generously
instructions.text: Place the steak on a large cutting board. Season both sides very generously with coarse sea salt. You can also add freshly ground black pepper if desired, though traditionally it is often omitted until serving.

instructions.title: Preheat the Grill
instructions.text: Prepare your grill for very high heat. Ideally, use a charcoal grill to achieve the authentic smoky flavor. Ensure the coals are glowing hot and covered with a fine ash. If using a gas grill, preheat to its highest setting.

instructions.title: Sear the Steak
instructions.text: Place the seasoned steak directly over the hottest part of the grill. Sear for 5-7 minutes per side, depending on thickness and desired doneness. The goal is a beautiful, dark crust. For a true Fiorentina, it should be rare to medium-rare.

instructions.title: Rest the Steak
instructions.text: Once seared, remove the steak from the grill and transfer it to a clean cutting board. Let it rest uncovered for at least 10-15 minutes. This allows the juices to redistribute, ensuring a tender and moist steak.

instructions.title: Slice and Serve
instructions.text: After resting, slice the steak off the bone, then slice the meat into thick pieces, about 1/2 to 3/4 inch thick. Drizzle with a good quality extra virgin olive oil and a final sprinkle of coarse salt if needed. Serve immediately.

tags: Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak
tips: Always bring the steak to room temperature before grilling for even cooking and a better crust.
Use only coarse sea salt for seasoning; pepper is optional and often added after cooking. A good quality extra virgin olive oil is essential for finishing.
Serve Bistecca alla Fiorentina immediately after resting and slicing. It is traditionally served rare, so adjust cooking time to your preference but embrace the Tuscan way.
article: Bistecca alla Fiorentina T Bone Steak is a beloved Italian Dinner Recipes dish enjoyed across Italian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
